# Sallaum Terms Snapshot

Sallaum is treated in this fake corpus as the steadier carrier on the Lagos lane.

Operational patterns:
- ETA drift exists, but less severe than Grimaldi on Lagos-bound rotations.
- Users still face berth uncertainty at Lagos even when the sailing itself is on plan.
- Sallaum questions should often pivot to port delay and clearance readiness rather than only vessel movement.
